overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sidewalk in Night City during dusk. The scene features futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated billboards, construction barriers lining the path, and moderate vehicle traffic on a multi-lane road.

events.description: exiting the covered area under the elevated highway into open sky

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, following the road as it curves slightly

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with heavy support beams covering the right side of the street
tall cylindrical skyscraper with large illuminated 07 signage on the facade
white and orange striped plastic construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
cluster of colorful illuminated digital billboards on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath a massive elevated highway structure that provides partial cover. The tall Building 07 tower dominates the left skyline while orange construction barriers line the right side of the path. Neon billboards glow in the distance against the dusk sky as cars pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban sidewalk with construction barriers

events.description: fully exited the overpass cover into the open street environment
multiple vehicles pass by closely on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open sidewalk, approaching a pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk at a steady pace, gradually getting closer to camera

entered.detail: tall modern street light with illuminated fixture passing by on the left
overhead traffic light gantry with red signals visible above the road

segments.scene_description: Now in the open air with full sky visibility, the camera follows a pedestrian ahead along the sidewalk. Street lights and traffic signals become prominent as the overpass recedes behind. Building 07 looms larger on the left while vehicles pass closely on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction zone with rubble approaching intersection

events.description: entering active construction zone with yellow barriers and visible rubble piles
approaching intersection with traffic lights and street name signs becoming readable

agents.ego_description: walking through the construction zone toward the intersection, maintaining pace with the pedestrian ahead

entered.detail: yellow metal construction barriers replacing the orange ones, indicating active work zone
large pile of concrete debris and rubble behind the yellow barriers
red street sign reading Bullard mounted on the traffic light pole
black and white speed limit sign displaying 40
large digital billboard displaying NIGHT CITY in bright cyan text

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an active construction zone marked by yellow barriers and rubble piles on the right. Street signs for Bullard and speed limit 40 become visible as the camera approaches the intersection. The prominent Night City billboard glows cyan in the center view while Building 07 recedes into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a city sidewalk that transitions from the shadow of an overpass into an open, neon-lit construction zone at dusk. It begins beneath a massive elevated highway structure, moving past orange construction barriers while the towering Building 07 dominates the left skyline. As the camera emerges into the open air, the overpass recedes to reveal a full view of the sky and prominent street lights, following a pedestrian ahead as vehicles pass closely on the road. The scene then shifts into an active construction area marked by yellow barriers and rubble piles, passing street signs for Bullard and a speed limit of 40. Finally, the camera approaches an intersection where a glowing cyan Night City billboard takes center stage as Building 07 fades into the distance.
